Programs

Foreign Trade

MENU

In the globalized world, mutual
interdependence among countries has increased significantly, and economic and
trade relations have become the most crucial factor in the growth and
development of nations. The Foreign Trade Program is established within the
framework of university-industry collaboration to train qualified workforce for
the foreign trade sector, considering the importance of economic relations. It
provides both professional and academic education, covering fundamental topics
such as the structure of our foreign trade, import-export regulations, and
customs regimes. By educating contemporary and knowledgeable students, the
program aims to contribute to the employment in the sector.

Period of Study:

2 Years

Score Type:

TYT

English Preparatory Class:

Compulsory
